name: recall-query-lambda
description: Recall query Lambda — embed question -> Pinecone search -> Claude -> answer + citations

scripts.zip: rm -f function.zip && zip -r function.zip index.js lib package.json

_note: Zero npm dependencies on purpose — Gemini, Pinecone, and Anthropic are all called with the runtime's built-in fetch(). The zip has NO node_modules, so it's tiny and avoids the bundling issues from Phase 2.
